caption: A man wearing a dark green baseball cap, headphones, and a matching dark green t-shirt with the white text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT" sits in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The background features several framed pictures on the wall, a white mannequin wearing a white shirt, and racks of clothing. Two logos are visible at the bottom of the scene: a circular logo containing the text "THE" and a red text logo that reads "BOLLY TOY". Throughout the clip, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand. He begins with his hand raised and fingers slightly curled, and as the sequence progresses, he slowly lowers his hand toward his chin, eventually bringing his fingers closer to his mouth while continuing to talk.
